title: Reflex Control
subtitlePlaying: Round {{current}}/{{total}}: Test your spending control reflexes!
readyHeader: Ready to Test Your Spending Control Skills?
readyDescription: Answer questions about controlling spending impulses.
readyTip: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!
developingSkills: You're developing strong spending control skills!

questions.question: What should you do when you see an impulse purchase you want?

options.text: Buy immediately before it sells out
Wait 24 hours before deciding
Ask friends to buy it for you
Add it to cart and forget about it

questions.question: How should you handle peer pressure to spend money?

options.text: Spend to fit in with friends
Borrow money to keep up
Stick to your budget and priorities
Avoid friends who spend more

questions.question: What's the best approach to social media shopping?

options.text: Buy everything that looks interesting
Unfollow accounts that trigger impulse buys
Shop during sales only
Never shop online

questions.question: How should you respond to limited-time offers?

options.text: Buy immediately to avoid missing out
Share with friends to split cost
Ignore all sales and promotions
Evaluate if you truly need the item

questions.question: What should you do before making a significant purchase?

options.text: Research alternatives and wait period
Buy immediately if it's on sale
Ask for opinions on social media
Compare prices at one store only
